    Index

    A C D E F G H I K L M N O P Q R S U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    D

    dateOfBirth - Variable in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
     
    DBQueries - Class in com.example.passmanager
    This class is used to have a place where all SQL statements passed to the backend can live, although these are susceptible to SQL injections the next scope will be to change that
    DBQueries() - Constructor for class com.example.passmanager.DBQueries
    Constructs a new DBQueries instance.
    decrypt(String, SecretKey) - Static method in class com.example.passmanager.AES
    We use Base64 as the encoder so we first have to get our bytes decoded back into bytes, and we know the structure of the cipher text follows that the first 12 bytes is the IV then follows the cipher text and then the GCM tag which is 128 bits.
    deleteAccount(AccountInstance) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.MainScreenController
    This calls a query from DBQueries to get the account associated with the username and platform given and removes it from the database
    deriveKey(String, byte[]) - Static method in class com.example.passmanager.AES
    Uses master password to convert it to a character array, the salt we generated above, we then use factory with the PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256 algorithm to derive the key.
    dobPicker - Variable in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
